title: Future of Marketing Briefing: Memes used to be a joke. Now they’re a strategy
description: Last month, a U.S. Special Forces soldier was indicted for insider trading — not on stocks, but on a prediction market. He had detailed knowledge of a military operation. He bet on it. The platform where he placed those bets responded to the indictment with something close to a shrug. That shrug tells you everything […]

title: Target shuffles merchandising leadership with slate of new SVPs
description: The mass retailer continues to revamp its leadership team as it works to regain product authority.

title: Medline Q1 results show expanding AI use, tariff concerns
description:
Medline Inc. is expanding its use of artificial intelligence (AI), digital supply chain software and robotics as it supports higher demand from new customer wins. In its first quarter of 2026, the medical supply company reported double‑digit sales growth, driven by new customer implementations and continued strength in its Supply Chain Solutions segment, executives said. […]
The post Medline Q1 results show expanding AI use, tariff concerns appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Ulta Beauty joins Uber Eats marketplace, expanding delivery options
description:
Ulta Beauty has become the latest retailer to join the Uber Eats marketplace, which enables the retailer to capitalize on same-day delivery. The companies timed their announcement on May 7 before Mother’s Day, which this year falls on May 10. Ulta Beauty joins a growing list of retailers using last-mile delivery platforms and marketplaces (which […]
The post Ulta Beauty joins Uber Eats marketplace, expanding delivery options appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Ecommerce Trends: How online retailers compete against Amazon
description:
After GameStop offered to acquire eBay on May 3 in a deal worth $56 billion, GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen framed the move as a path to help eBay compete against Amazon. “It could be a legit competitor to Amazon,” Cohen said in a Wall Street Journal report dated March 4. Part of Cohen’s strategy would […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: How online retailers compete against Amazon appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Digital Marketing Optimization: 10 Best Strategies to Increase Marketing ROI
description: Digital marketing optimization plays a major role in whether a marketing program grows or remains stagnant. Most teams are running campaigns, tracking metrics, and still scratching their heads, wondering why the pipeline isn’t moving. Honestly? The problem usually comes down to process, not effort.

title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4

title: Luna Bar strategizes new era with social ads starring Jessica Alba
description: The Mondelēz-owned snack bar brand’s “Easy to Love” campaign represents its first major creative push in nearly a decade.

title: Papa Johns’ CMO on driving cultural relevance with a ‘Toy Story’ tie-up
description: Jenna Bromberg digs into recent moves around marketing co-ops and agency partners and how the chain is working with Google Cloud on AI.

title: Amazon, LinkedIn help advertisers reach professionals via CTV ads
description: As part of a new collaboration, marketers can run the networking platform’s CTV ad campaigns using Amazon DSP.

title: How to earn customer trust in the age of AI
description:
Strong customer relationships are built through consistent actions, shared goals, and a genuine commitment to customer success.

title: Why AI personalization strategies fail
description:
Most personalization plans collapse during execution because operational realities don't match the vision.

title: Moving beyond silos to align complex customer journeys
description:
Complex campaigns break down when platforms, channels, and data flows fall out of sync. Martech helps keep customer journeys aligned.

title: AI SEO punishes lazy marketing strategies by Brick Marketing
description:
AI-driven search draws on broader signals, exposing gaps in fragmented campaigns and favoring brands with a consistent, cross-channel presence.
The post AI SEO punishes lazy marketing strategies appeared first on MarTech.
